main_themes: The 'Wounds in Prayer': How unresolved childhood resentment blocks spiritual connection.
God's Provision: Trusting the timeline even when the bank account feels thin.
The Discipline of Joy: Choosing a biochemical state of gratitude regardless of current emotion.

nuggets.idea_one_liner: You don't feel your way into gratitude; you practice your way into joy until the emotion follows the action.

creator_notes.tone: Compassionate but firm on spiritual discipline. (V3 Reprocessed Output).
